mechanism_narrative: Declining federal funds rates reduce borrowing costs and discount rates, directly boosting equity valuations over the short term.
failure_condition: Rank IC < 0.03 over 3-year rolling window or positive returns not significantly higher during rate cuts.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid rise in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.5 percentage points in a single month signals severe labor market deterioration, triggering negative equity returns as earnings expectations collapse.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in real personal consumption expenditures and housing starts indicate a broad-based demand shock, causing investors to sell equities in anticipation of falling corporate revenues.
failure_condition: Joint decline in RSAFS and HOUST fails to predict negative returns (Rank IC < 0.02) over 60-day horizon.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp contraction in the index of industrial production below its 12-month moving average signals supply-side weakness that drags on equity returns, but only during periods of high inflation.
failure_condition: Signal loses predictive power (Rank IC < 0.01) when CPIAUCSL growth is below 2% annually.

mechanism_narrative: A federal funds rate below 1.0% confirms a zero-lower-bound policy stance that mandates aggressive liquidity injections, producing positive equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Positive returns do not materialize in > 50% of instances when FEDFUNDS < 1.0%.

mechanism_narrative: Steady growth in total nonfarm payrolls reflects underlying economic resilience, providing a consistent positive drift to equity markets over a one-week horizon.
failure_condition: Rank IC < 0.03 over 3-year rolling window or payroll growth fails to predict positive 5-day returns.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between rising GDP and falling real personal consumption expenditures signals unsustainable growth driven by non-consumer sectors, leading to a subsequent equity correction over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Divergence condition fails to predict negative 60-day returns (Rank IC < 0.02) in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month decline in industrial production exceeding 1.0% indicates a severe supply shock that immediately pressures equity valuations downward over the following week.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 65% of triggered instances despite negative signal.
